completed_tasks.name: TDD: persist OpenedChestIds across BeginRun + skip in seeder
SaveNow before BeginRun on dungeon death
HUD gold label below stamina bar (prior session)

remaining_tasks.name: Joint human-verify Round A (05-05) + Round B (05-06)
Code review, regression gate, verifier, update_roadmap

blockers.description: Issue A: Camera/viewport desync when F11 toggles while dialogue is open — paused gameplay scene under DialogueScene does not run Follow(), so Camera.Position is never re-clamped against new viewport/zoom. Tiles or player look misaligned until dialogue closes.
blockers.workaround: Add public Camera.Reclamp() (DONE, uncommitted in src/Core/Camera.cs) and call it from Game1.ToggleFullscreen() right after _services?.Camera.FitZoomToViewport(3.0f).

blockers.description: Issue B: ShopPanel hardcodes ScreenWidth=960 and a static PanelX = (960-720)/2; the dim overlay draws new Rectangle(0,0,960,540). In any non-960x540 viewport (especially fullscreen) the dim doesn't cover the screen and the panel sits top-left instead of centered.
blockers.workaround: Mirror the DialogueBox fix: thread viewportWidth/viewportHeight through ShopPanel.Update + Draw + UpdateLayoutCache; compute _panelX/_panelY at runtime; pass Services.GraphicsDevice.Viewport from ShopOverlayScene.

human_actions_pending.action: After fixes A+B land, run the game and execute joint Round A + Round B verify steps from the prior assistant message
human_actions_pending.context: Both fixes need eyes-on testing in fullscreen mode; only the user can confirm visual correctness

decisions.decision: Sequential inline execution (no parallel worktree agents) for Wave 1 of phase 05
decisions.rationale: Both 05-05 and 05-06 are autonomous:false with the same human-verify checkpoint; parallel agents would queue at the same blocking gate anyway. Joint dotnet run session is more efficient.

Pre-existing test asserted the OLD invariant (OpenedChestIds cleared on BeginRun). Renamed to BeginRun_ClearsRunFlags_ButPreservesBossDefeatedAndOpenedChests and updated assertion to Contains("chest_a") to reflect the new spec from 05-06 plan.

decisions.decision: DungeonChestSeeder writes empty list (not skip) for opened chests
decisions.rationale: Plan 05-06 spec — keeps every registered chest as a key in ChestContents so save snapshots are consistent and any future consumer that checks for missing keys still works correctly.

uncommitted_files: src/Core/Camera.cs (added public Reclamp() method — needs Game1 wiring + commit)
next_action: Read .planning/phases/05-dungeon/.continue-here.md, then apply the 3-line Game1.ToggleFullscreen wiring (fix A), then port the DialogueBox viewport-aware pattern to ShopPanel (fix B). Build + dungeon tests should stay green. Then resume joint human-verify.
context_notes: Phase 05 dungeon gap-closure wave (--gaps-only). 05-06 implementation is COMPLETE and committed; 05-05 was already implemented before this session. The user attempted human-verify and reported two regressions (Issue A: camera desync mid-dialogue on F11; Issue B: shop hardcoded 960x540). These are NOT in the original plan scope but they're the same family of viewport-awareness bugs DialogueBox had — fixing them is required before re-requesting verify. ShopPanel is in src/UI/ShopPanel.cs with PanelX const at line 24 and the offending dim Rectangle at line 452. Mirror the exact pattern used in DialogueBox.Draw signature change (additive int viewportWidth, int viewportHeight params at end). ShopOverlayScene is the single caller and needs its Update + Draw to pass Services.GraphicsDevice.Viewport.
